repo.description: Firefox privacy, security and anti-tracking: a comprehensive user.js template for configuration and hardening

terms.context_snippet: A `user.js` is a configuration file that can control Firefox settings - for a more technical breakdown and explanation, you can read more in the [wiki](https://github.com/arkenfox/user.js/wiki/2.1-User.js)
